0: Cadence — the authored period of each periodic concern, in seconds, addressed by the purpose branch it paces. A branch named here recurs at this rate and is admitted to a wake only when it is due (phase ≥ 1); a branch absent here is aperiodic and admitted whenever its perception is present. This is the reference side (Π): I author it, and the kernel stamps the matching last-touched. Empty — only this voicing — means every concern is aperiodic, the default. A periodic parent makes its whole subtree sleep until due.
